get_vehicle_component.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337)

Gets a vehicle component by its name.
Returns a vehicle_component object, or nil on failure.

return → VehicleComponent component

get_vehicle_components.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337)

Gets all root vehicle components and returns them in a Lua table.

return → table<VehicleComponent> components

get_all_vehicle_components.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337)

Gets all vehicle components (including children) and returns them in a Lua table.

return → table<VehicleComponent> components

vehicle_component.from_memory.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component static

Creates a vehicle_component object from raw memory pointers.

return → VehicleComponent component

component:get_pointer.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component

Returns the raw memory pointer of the component.

return → uint ptr

component:set_visibility.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component

Sets the visibility state of the component.
Use component_state enum: DISABLED, ENABLED, DAMAGED.

return → nil

component:set_alpha.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component

Sets the alpha (transparency) of the component. 0 = fully transparent, 255 = fully opaque.

return → nil

component:get_objects.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component

Returns a table of VehicleAtomic objects attached to this component.

return → table<VehicleAtomic> objects

component:get_child_components.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_component

Returns a table of child VehicleComponent objects belonging to this component.

return → table<VehicleComponent> components

vehicle_atomic_object.from_memory.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_atomic_object static

Creates a VehicleAtomic object from raw memory pointers.

return → VehicleAtomic object

object:hide.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_atomic_object

Shows or hides the atomic object. Pass true to hide, false to show.

return → nil

object:get_atomic_flag.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_atomic_object

Returns the value of an atomic rendering flag.

return → bool value

object:set_atomic_flag.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_atomic_object

Sets an atomic rendering flag to the given boolean value.

return → nil

object:get_materials.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_atomic_object

Returns a table of VehicleMaterial objects used by this atomic.

return → table<VehicleMaterial> materials

vehicle_object_material.from_memory.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material static

Creates a VehicleMaterial object from raw memory pointers.

return → VehicleMaterial material

material:set_color.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets the RGBA color of the material.

return → nil

material:get_color.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the RGBA color values of the material.

return → int r, int g, int b, int a

material:reset_color.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the material color to its original value.

return → nil

material:set_texture.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Assigns a texture to the material.

return → nil

material:get_texture.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the texture currently applied to the material. Returns nil on failure.

return → Texture texture

material:reset_texture.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the material texture to its original value.

return → nil

material:get_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the ambient lighting value of the material.

return → float ambient

material:set_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets the ambient lighting value of the material.

return → nil

material:reset_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the ambient value to its original.

return → nil

material:get_specular.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the specular highlight value of the material.

return → float specular

material:set_specular.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets the specular highlight value of the material.

return → nil

material:reset_specular.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the specular value to its original.

return → nil

material:get_diffuse.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the diffuse lighting value of the material.

return → float diffuse

material:set_diffuse.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets the diffuse lighting value of the material.

return → nil

material:reset_diffuse.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the diffuse value to its original.

return → nil

material:get_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Gets all surface properties (ambient, specular, diffuse) and returns them in a Lua table.

return → table<properties> properties

material:set_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets surface properties from a Lua table. Keys: ambient, specular, diffuse.

return → nil

material:reset_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets all surface properties to their original values.

return → nil
